tooling_sandboxing.detail: Ships real sandboxing (macOS Seatbelt, or Docker/Podman/gVisor/LXC on Linux, confining writes to the project dir) but it is disabled by default and only activates via -s flag, GEMINI_SANDBOX env var, or config, so host execution is the default.

context_memory.detail: Supports conversation checkpointing to save and resume complex sessions plus token caching, alongside GEMINI.md context files for project-specific memory.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: BeforeTool hooks run synchronously before a tool call and can deny it (exit code 2 or a JSON {"decision":"deny"} response), with matching AfterTool hooks for post-execution logic, configured in settings.json.

prompt_optimization.detail: Custom context files (GEMINI.md) let projects inject persistent, hierarchical system-prompt guidance without modifying the CLI's core prompt.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: Distributed as a self-hosted, config-driven CLI runtime (settings.json, hooks, GEMINI.md) that you run yourself against the Gemini API/Vertex AI backend, not an SDK primitive set or a fully managed execution platform.
